title: Knocked-Out Tooth (Avulsed Tooth)
immediate_steps: Find the tooth and pick it up by the crown (the chewing part), NOT the root
If dirty, rinse it gently in cold running water for 10 seconds
Try to place the tooth back into its socket and have the person bite down gently on gauze to hold it
If you cannot reinsert it, place the tooth in a container of cold milk, or have the person hold it inside their cheek
Get to a dentist immediately (within 30-60 minutes for best chances)
avoid: Do not scrub the tooth or use soap
Do not store the tooth in plain water
Do not wrap it in a tissue or cloth (it will dry out)
